objective: Admit only provenance-safe, pixel-inspected, comparison-fit human visual references and prepare phone-legible single-subject direction evidence without importing production assets or selecting a runtime.
next_action: Screen a small authoritative and clearly licensed human-reference set, inspect actual pixels at useful scale, reject unsuitable candidates, and generate one large single-subject direction image only if source screening cannot resolve the mature semi-realistic stylized target.
research_gate: Use authoritative or clearly licensed sources, inspect actual pixels rather than metadata, and keep the candidate set small. Do not download executable content, import a production asset, or treat popularity as quality.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized reference research, disposable image inspection, rejection, and bounded visual-direction generation only. Dependent implementation remains blocked until a verified-fit receipt exists and any real creative uncertainty is resolved. No approval, promotion, engine selection, external executable, or protected-Kernel mutation.
context_health: Green after K1 continuity hardening and focused correction of stale aging semantics. Typed knowledge retrieval is available; H5 resumes with prior rejections retained in its canonical intake record, capture current, and heartbeat paused.

macro_findings: H5 is the first visual-inspection stage; later recovery and promotion gates remain blocked.
F5 remains engine-neutral and cannot import a production asset, install a tool, or select a runtime.
The owner requires a good-quality, accurate human comparison target, phone-legible review fixtures, and cheap proof before integrated PC work.
Natural-function methods remain case-by-case hypotheses: hard constraints kill invalid candidates, while no metaphor receives universal authority.
micro_findings: The existing wire capture and three official MakeHuman documentation screenshots were pixel-inspected and rejected as incomplete, obscured, or too structurally sparse.
The first three-panel generated sheet was rejected on phone because the differences collapsed at display scale; future fixtures use one large subject or stage per image.
The target is mature semi-realistic anatomy with economical stylization and restrained toon-like shading, not photorealism or childlike caricature.
Canonical biological age continues independently; the adult-appearance lock affects only eligible post-adult presentation and unlocking reveals true age.
One canonical organism must support coordinated presentation tiers from constrained phones to high-end PCs without changing gameplay identity.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: H5 must inspect an actual coherent human at useful scale. All current candidates are rejected, and generated visual direction cannot substitute for anatomical or implementation evidence.

receipts.provenance: Official Blender Studio and community Human Base Meshes v1.4.1 CC0 archive; embedded preview pixels inspected from disposable extraction.
receipts.intended_comparison: Coherent mature full-human anatomy and a realistic-to-stylized direction boundary.
receipts.accuracy_limits: Embedded previews are 256x256 single views with the subject too small for detailed comparison.
rendered_views_inspected: Four original 256x256 male/female realistic/stylized bundle previews
visible_defects: Hands, feet, and face lack comparison detail

receipts.provenance: Wikimedia render of the exact Blender Studio female realistic CC0 body asset, linked to the official Blender bundle; inspected at 1280x960.
receipts.intended_comparison: Large-pixel mature full-human form, silhouette, hands, feet, and realistic endpoint.
receipts.accuracy_limits: Only one elevated three-quarter render; no true side or back view and visible hip/thigh transitions.

tiers_completed.result: Canonical target, hard visual constraints, prior failures, phone legibility, aging semantics, and source authority were refreshed before candidate search.
Prior original-pixel inspection rejected the wire capture and three official MakeHuman documentation images before any install or integrated execution.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: No coherent full-human source candidate has yet passed pixels, provenance, anatomy, completeness, and comparison conditions together.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: The bounded source screen proved that a single-subject generated direction fixture is the cheapest next style clarification while authoritative anatomy admission remains blocked.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: A few primary-source page and image inspections; no install, executable download, production import, or integrated PC run.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: Retain hashes, source URLs, visible defects, accuracy limits, and explicit rejected or verified-fit dispositions; do not mutate H2-H4 structural evidence.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Source expansion stopped after MakeHuman and Blender Studio; do not browse broadly while marginal information gain remains below a single-subject direction fixture.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: After visual receipts and any necessary owner check, retain exact fingerprint binding, mutation-negative checks, and the complete Forge gate before H5 closure.

unresolved_risks: No current repository asset is a verified good-quality human visual reference.
A reputable or correctly licensed source can still be visually incomplete, anatomically misleading, or wrong for the comparison.
A single view can hide defects, while a multi-panel sheet can become illegible on a phone.
Generated imagery can clarify style but cannot prove anatomy, topology, animation, growth behavior, shader cost, or device performance.
Visual observation must not approve, promote, or overwrite structural evidence.
evidence_requirements: authoritative source identity, license or use authority, and content fingerprint per admitted candidate
actual-pixel inspection at useful scale and relevant views
anatomy, completeness, occlusion, pose, view, lighting, detail, phone legibility, and visible-defect record
explicit verified-fit, rejected, or owner-check-required disposition
single large subject or stage per phone review fixture
no approval, promotion, runtime selection, executable install, or production asset import
verification_plan: completed: research MakeHuman and Blender Studio as the bounded authoritative source set
completed: inspect actual pixels and reject incomplete or defective references before comparison
retain source and visual-fitness receipts in the H5 canonical record
generate only one large single-subject direction fixture if source evidence cannot resolve style
route only genuine remaining subjective uncertainty to the owner
run stage-quality, coherence, mutation-negative, and complete Forge gates before closure
resume_after: Continue autonomous source and pixel-fitness research. Ask the owner only if an inspected candidate remains genuinely uncertain or a creative choice between defensible alternatives cannot be resolved from existing direction.
verification_receipts: K1 conversational knowledge intake hardened and complete Forge gate passed
stale aging prose reconciled with the executable adult-lock proof; 8 focused cases pass
existing Forge wire reference inspected and rejected for human-quality comparison
three official MakeHuman documentation images inspected and rejected
official Blender CC0 archive fingerprinted and four embedded body previews inspected and rejected as too small and incomplete
four 1280x960 renders of the exact Blender assets inspected; realistic endpoints retained only as direction evidence and stylized endpoints rejected as too caricatured
first three-panel direction sheet rejected as phone-illegible
transition: R0 accepted -> H1-H4 verified -> H5 source rejections -> N0-N3 natural-method wave complete -> K1 continuity intake hardened -> aging drift repaired -> H5 source and pixel intake resumed
